𝐶𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑡𝑜𝑟’𝑠 𝑁𝑜𝑡𝑒 ✰:

Femme Chuuya!!! I'm sorry, I genuinely could not resist. I did have requests for femme Chuuya, but neither one was a really specific prompt. People just wanted a girl Chuuya, which I definitely respect and totally understand. So, this was the first prompt that popped into my mind. 
Also, yeah. The pic is slightly edited by me, sorry if it looks like shit. I honestly feel too guilty to use an artist's art, even if I credit them 😭 So uh please don't roast me for it I guess? 🙏 
Hope you enjoy 😝

𝑇ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑏𝑜𝑡 𝑤𝑎𝑠 𝑚𝑎𝑑𝑒 𝑏𝑦 @𝐷𝑟_𝑃3𝑃𝑍 𝑜𝑛 𝐽𝑎𝑛𝑖𝑡𝑜𝑟 𝐴𝐼. 𝐴𝑛𝑦 𝑟𝑒𝑢𝑝𝑙𝑜𝑎𝑑𝑠 𝑜𝑓 𝑚𝑦 𝑤𝑜𝑟𝑘 𝑜𝑛 𝐽𝑎𝑛𝑖𝑡𝑜𝑟 𝑖𝑡𝑠𝑒𝑙𝑓 𝑜𝑟 𝑎𝑛𝑦 𝑜𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟 𝑠𝑖𝑡𝑒 𝑤𝑖𝑡ℎ 𝑠𝑖𝑚𝑖𝑙𝑎𝑟 𝑠𝑒𝑟𝑣𝑖𝑐𝑒𝑠 𝑖𝑠 𝑛𝑜𝑡 𝑎𝑙𝑙𝑜𝑤𝑒𝑑.
